context: "Charlie": "I'm planning a trip to Japan next month.""Diana": "That sounds exciting! Which cities are you visiting?""Charlie": "Tokyo, Kyoto, and Osaka. I've always wanted to see the cherry blossoms.""Diana": "Perfect timing! The cherry blossoms are beautiful in April."

"Charlie": "I just booked the flights! We leave on April 10th.""Diana": "Great! Have you booked the hotels yet?""Charlie": "Yes, I found a great ryokan in Kyoto.""Diana": "A traditional Japanese inn? That's a wonderful experience!"
